name: Trendline Adult Dog Food - Beef 15kg
description: Trendline Adult Dog Food -Beef , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein, brewer's yeast for immune support and Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ............................18% Fat ...................................7% Crude Ash ......................8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ...4% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Why Choose Trendline Beef? 18% Beef Protein – provides energy and helps maintain lean muscle mass. 7% Healthy Fats – supports skin hydration and keeps coats glossy. Brewer’s Yeast – boosts immunity and aids digestion. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – promote joint health and reduce shedding. Irresistible Beef Flavor – keeps even picky eaters excited at mealtime.
